## What they do
Card issuer for the Fasset Card. Bahrain-based. Handles card issuance compliance by country. Determines global expansion feasibility for the card product.

## Coverage
- **Section A — Allowed (48 countries):** Antigua & Barbuda, Argentina, Australia, Bahamas, Barbados, Bangladesh, Belize, Bolivia, Brazil, Cayman Islands, Colombia, Costa Rica, Côte d'Ivoire, Dominica, Dominican Republic, Ecuador, Egypt, El Salvador, Ghana, Grenada, Guatemala, Guyana, Honduras, Japan, Kenya, Malaysia, Mexico, Morocco, New Zealand, Pakistan, Panama, Paraguay, Peru, Philippines, St Kitts & Nevis, St Lucia, St Vincent & the Grenadines, Senegal, Singapore, South Africa, Suriname, Thailand, Trinidad & Tobago, Turks & Caicos, UAE, Uganda, Uruguay, Zambia.
- **Section B — US states (31).**
- **Section C — Issuance banned (18):** Belarus, China (Mainland), Cuba, Hong Kong, India, Iran, Iraq, Israel, Myanmar, Nepal, Nicaragua, North Korea, Russia, Syria, Turkey, Ukraine, Venezuela, Vietnam.
- **Section D — Conditional (1):** Nigeria — requires enhanced compliance review + explicit Rain approval. Blocked since 2024 (Checkout.com fraud), needs T&C update.
- **Spending banned (7):** Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Russia, Syria, Ukraine, Venezuela.
- FATF Grey List markets require case-by-case review.

## Contacts
- **Arundathi Belur** — primary internal lead, manages Rain relationship.
- Rain country list (Docsend): https://docsend.com/view/teujfbd7d3ykzf4x/d/9nyix5d94pu2396i

## Open issues
- Card "approved by Rain but not syncing to internal system" — manual sync issues, frequent CX tickets.
- Daily issue burden on CS team — Kazi raised alternatives question.
- Nigeria T&C update needed for Rain compliance.
- Pricing comparison (Hamis owes Ibrahim/Rafi).

## History
- KSA + Ethiopia confirmed by Nashit on Apr 16 despite not being on Section A list.
- Bridge + Reap were explored as alternatives.
- 2026-05-04 - **Rain confirmed as primary card provider** (Product Daily Standup). Bridge dropped (high costs, beta). Existing single-wallet module built for Bridge reusable for Rain. REAP contract (July/Aug) kept as fallback. MasterCard contract via Neum/Paynetics/direct as Phase 2. Comp Secure confirmed as single vendor for physical card orders (first order processed, 6-week lead).
